name: Pelican
description_short: Pelican State Credit Union offers checking, savings, credit cards, personal loans, and home equity lines of credit to members with access to nationwide ATM networks and free credit counseling.
description_long:
Pelican State Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution that provides comprehensive banking and lending services to its member base. The organization operates as a traditional credit union, offering deposit accounts, credit products, and financial advisory services through both physical branches and digital channels.

Pelican's service portfolio includes checking and savings accounts (including youth and teen accounts), Visa credit cards with rewards programs (Points, Prime, and Premier tiers), personal loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOC), and balance transfer opportunities. The credit union actively promotes 0% APR balance transfer offers for existing cardholders and provides online account management features including application status tracking and check reordering. Members gain access to a branch and ATM locator system for nationwide account access.

The credit union distinguishes itself through member-exclusive benefits including free credit counseling delivered by Nationally Certified Credit Counselors available both in-person and virtually, member-only rewards enrollment, and youth financial education programs. The organization emphasizes fraud protection education and provides comprehensive card management tools for activation, loss reporting, and PIN changes.

As a credit union, Pelican operates on a member-ownership model rather than shareholder profit maximization, which typically translates to more favorable rates and lower fees. However, membership eligibility requirements apply, and the website does not disclose specific product rates, fees, geographic service area limitations, or membership qualification criteria—information essential for consumer decision-making.
services: Pelican Points Visa credit cards with rewards
Free credit counseling from Nationally Certified Credit Counselors
Lost/stolen card reporting and PIN management
pros: Free credit counseling from Nationally Certified Credit Counselors available in-person and virtually for all members
0% APR balance transfer offers for 12 months on Points, Prime, and Premier Visa cardholders
Member-exclusive rewards discounts accessible through online enrollment
Youth and teen account options with financial education focus for early financial literacy
Nationwide ATM network access for members regardless of travel location
Fraud protection education and proactive member alerts about scams
Online application status tracking and check reordering without branch visits
cons: Website does not disclose specific APR rates, fees, or product terms required for informed comparison
Membership eligibility requirements not clearly stated on homepage; may restrict access for some consumers
Limited geographic service area information; credit union membership field of membership not specified
No mention of mobile app features, mobile banking capabilities, or digital-first account opening process
Balance transfer 0% APR offer has an unstated expiration date (through December 31, 2026) and specific terms unclear
best_for: Existing or prospective credit union members seeking comprehensive banking with integrated credit counseling
Consumers with existing high-interest credit card balances eligible for balance transfer offers
Parents introducing children to financial responsibility through youth savings and teen checking accounts
Members seeking personalized credit guidance and debt management support at no cost
diagnosis: Pelican State Credit Union is best suited for consumers who qualify for membership and seek a full-service credit union with integrated financial counseling and competitive balance transfer offers. The primary limitation is the absence of transparent pricing, rate, and membership eligibility information on the public website, making it difficult for prospective members to evaluate whether Pelican meets their needs without direct contact.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Pelican — Credit Union in Baton Rouge, LA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Pelican — NCUA-insured credit union in Baton Rouge, LA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
